accountHolderId.description: The identifier of the account holder to which the grant is offered.

amount.description: The principal amount of the grant.

contractType.description: The contract type of the grant offer. Possible value: **cashAdvance**, **loan**.

expiresAt.description: The end date of the grant offer validity period.

id.description: The unique identifier of the grant offer.

startsAt.description: The starting date of the grant offer validity period.
